Name: TypeOfResource
Description: Type of resource used. Supports the use of an external controlled vocabulary.

Name: ResourceObjectReference
Description: Reference to the resource object used by this development step. If it is an external object create a description as OtherMaterial and reference the OtherMaterial. Use the attribute "objectLanguage" to specify any language preference. Repeat for multiple development objects. TypeOfObject should relate to the object referenced.

Name: ResourceUsage
Description: The use of the resource within the DevelopmentProcessingStep.
